title: Steam Golems [Copper Plated]
description: Steampunk-Themed resource pack rethinking the Minecraft mobs!
body:
**Steam Golems** [Copper Plated] is a Steampunk-Themed texture pack modifying some of the mobs models, animations and concepts, turning Minecraft into an early-staged anachronic battlefield.


This pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).
